scripts.tauri:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Write-Host '[提示] 启动前检查端口 18420...'; $p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 18420 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); if($p){$p|ForEach-Object{Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue}; Write-Host '[提示] 已清理端口占用进程';} else {Write-Host '[提示] 端口空闲';}; Write-Host '[提示] 正在启动 Tauri，首次编译可能需要 3-10 分钟，成功后会弹出桌面窗口'; npm.cmd run tauri:dev:raw"
